title: Report to the legislature
doc_html:
§710.  Report to the legislature

The Department of Culture, Recreation and Tourism shall annually report to the legislature on activities within the region and on progress made in developing the region as a historic and cultural tourist attraction.  

Acts 1990, No. 1021, §1.
